metadata.description: planfi skills — financial planning and real-estate investment analysis powered by the public planfi MCP.

plugins.name: str-investment-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze short-term-rental (Airbnb/VRBO) property investments by city: cash flow, cash-on-cash, cap rate, break-even occupancy, risk flag, managed-vs-self comparison, and a hold-period return (or indefinite buy-and-hold). Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: financial-forecast
plugins.description: Build a complete FIRE / financial forecast: net-worth projection, FIRE age, Monte Carlo success rate, insights, action plan, and what-if scenario comparisons. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: rent-vs-buy
plugins.description: Rent vs buy: breakeven home-appreciation rate (pre & after tax), per-horizon BUY-vs-RENT net worth, payoff/crossover years, and invest-the-difference opportunity cost. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: tax-optimizer
plugins.description: Cut taxes across accounts and years: broad tax optimization (asset location, tax-loss harvesting, charitable), multi-year ISO/conversion timing (AMT/NIIT/IRMAA-aware), Roth conversion ladders, mega-backdoor Roth space, and advanced surtaxes (NIIT/AMT/state). Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: equity-comp-planner
plugins.description: Value and tax employer equity (RSUs, ISOs, NSOs, ESPP), find the ISO/AMT crossover, and assess single-stock concentration risk with a tax-aware diversification plan. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: retirement-income
plugins.description: Plan retirement decumulation: tax-smart withdrawal order, Social Security claiming age, ACA healthcare bridge before Medicare, estate-tax exposure, and guaranteed income — pension lump-sum vs lifetime monthly and whether a SPIA/QLAC beats a DIY portfolio. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: debt-and-cashflow
plugins.description: Pay down debt and route surplus cash optimally: avalanche/snowball debt payoff order, mortgage prepay vs invest, refinance break-even, and a next-best-dollar funding waterfall. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: fire-tracker
plugins.description: Track FIRE progress: are you already financially independent / can you coast, how you benchmark against peers, which net-worth milestones you've hit, and whether you can hit a target retirement age (with the easiest levers to pull). Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: self-employed-planner
plugins.description: Plan self-employed / business-owner retirement: max Solo 401(k) vs SEP-IRA vs SIMPLE contribution room, the §199A QBI deduction (thresholds, W-2/UBIA cap, SSTB phaseout), and the S-corp reasonable-salary tradeoff (payroll tax vs QBI vs retirement room). Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.
